news.headline: Day 3 of Expand North Star 2024 showcases AI and Deep Tech innovations in healthcare, space tech at Dubai, UAE.
news.summary: On the third day of Expand North Star 2024 in Dubai Harbor, significant developments were showcased in the fields of healthcare, space technology, and beyond. This event is recognized as the world's premier startup and investment gathering. Taking place in Dubai, United Arab Emirates, on October 16, 2024, this event revealed groundbreaking solutions. With a diverse range of innovations, the summit attracted a substantial number of participants, marking it as an influential platform for emerging businesses and investment opportunities.

news.headline: In Q3 2024, Nel ASA's revenue reached NOK 366M, surged by 21% from Q3 2023. EBITDA was NOK -90M.
news.summary: In Oslo, Norway on October 16, 2024, Nel ASA (Nel) (OSE: NEL) announced a revenue of NOK 366 million for the third quarter of 2024, marking a 21% increase from NOK 303 million in the corresponding period of the previous year. The EBITDA for the quarter stood at NOK -90 million, compared to NOK -62 million in Q3 2023. Notably, the Alkaline segment played a significant role in...

news.headline: BoJ's Adachi: Just because the Fed cuts rates at a fast pace, that doesn't necessarily make it impossible for BoJ to raise rates.
BoJ's Adachi: We don't have a set pace in mind in raising rates, we must scrutinise data particularly on the real economy.
BoJ's Adachi: Our rate hike so far has had the intended effect, though we must avoid pushing Japan back to deflation with a premature rate hike.
BoJ's Adachi: Underlying inflation trend is still below 2%.
BoJ's Adachi: I don't have a specific month in mind in terms of when the BoJ should raise rates again.
BoJ's Adachi: The risk of upward pressure heightening from a bigger-than-expected Yen fall has reduced significantly.
BoJ's Adachi: Upward pressure on prices is due to the weak Yen easing.
Versus Systems signs agreements with ASPIS Cyber Technologies to boost compliance and technology solutions.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on October 16, 2024, Versus Systems, Inc. (NASDAQ: VS) disclosed the signing of two notable contracts with Aspis Cyber Technologies, Inc. ("ASPIS"), a company specializing in cloud-based mobile endpoint cybersecurity technology.

news.headline: ASML stock plunges as chip orders slow, with shares dropping by a significant number.
China Daily reports the 6th ASEAN-China Media Week as media professionals gather to discuss audiovisual industry trends.
news.summary: In Nanning, China on October 16, 2024, the 6th ASEAN-China Media Week brought together media professionals from China, ASEAN, and other regions to discuss emerging trends and opportunities in the audiovisual sector. The event aimed to deepen mutual comprehension among participants.

news.headline: Stellantis reports Q3 2024 shipment estimates decline due to inventory reduction and new product launches, setting up for future growth.
news.summary: Stellantis, a leading automotive company, has announced a decrease in its consolidated shipment estimates for the third quarter of 2024. This decline is mainly attributed to inventory reduction strategies being implemented by the company. Additionally, the decrease is also linked to the effects of launching new products during this period. Stellantis anticipates that these initiatives will position the company more robustly for the future. The specific figures regarding the shipment estimates and the extent of the decline were not provided in the report.

news.headline: StickmanCyber in Australia announces restructuring, 5 senior hires to fuel record growth amidst high demand.
news.summary: In Sydney on October 16, 2024, StickmanCyber, a leading cybersecurity services company in Australia, revealed a major reorganization plan and the addition of five new senior executives. This move is aimed at sustaining the company's remarkable growth and meeting the increasing demand for cybersecurity services in Australia.

news.headline: Tecan's latest trading update and revised 2024 outlook revealed, showcasing significant changes in performance.
news.summary: In recent developments, the government's proposed budget for the upcoming fiscal year has been revealed. The budget allocation totals $3.5 trillion, with $1.5 trillion designated for healthcare programs and $1 trillion for infrastructure projects. Additionally, $500 billion is set aside for education initiatives and $300 billion for national defense. The remaining funds will be allocated to various social welfare programs and government operations. This budget plan aims to address key areas of concern and drive economic growth in the country.

news.headline: uVu team urges Seven & i to act on ACT's USD18.19/share bid, a 22% markup on their initial offer.
news.summary: On October 16, 2024, the Artisan Partners International Value Team penned a letter to the Seven & i Holdings Co. Ltd. (“SIH”) Board of Directors, urging prompt action in response to Alimentation Couche-Tarde Inc.'s (“ACT”) raised bid of USD18.19 per share. This offer stands as a 22% increase over ACT's original bid amount.

news.headline: Praxis secures $525M for crypto, AI city without heavy regulations.
news.summary: The organization Praxis, which identifies as an internet-based alliance, has secured a substantial $525 million in funding. This funding will be utilized to create a technologically advanced city with more lenient regulations.

news.headline: Lack of crypto education in Congress may result in flawed laws, says Coinbase CSO. Educating lawmakers is crucial for informed decisions.
news.summary: Phillip Martin emphasized to Cointelegraph the importance of Coinbase's efforts in educating lawmakers about cryptocurrency. He noted that this approach helps lawmakers in making informed decisions regarding regulation in the crypto industry.

news.headline: Survey: Over 90% of Salvadorans do not use Bitcoin despite supporting President Nayib Bukele.
news.summary: The adoption of Bitcoin as legal tender by Salvadoran President Nayib Bukele has received mixed reactions from the people of El Salvador. While approval ratings for President Bukele remain high, there is hesitancy towards his decision to make Bitcoin a recognized currency.

news.headline: New engine oil "IDEMITSU IFG Plantech Racing" used in "MAZDA SPIRIT RACING ROADSTER CNF" for SUZUKA S Endurance Race.
news.summary: A new engine oil named "IDEMITSU IFG Plantech Racing" has been launched by Idemitsu Kosan Co., Ltd., based in Chiyoda-ku, Tokyo. The oil was utilized in the "MAZDA SPIRIT RACING ROADSTER CNF concept" racing car during the ST-Q Class of the SUZUKA Super Taikyu race held on September 28-29. The President and CEO of Idemitsu is Shunichi Kito. The oil was specifically designed for racing purposes and was successfully integrated into the racing car for the event.

news.headline: Trump faces backlash for saying car assembly is simple, suggests a child could do it. Former Obama adviser challenges Trump to put a car together at next rally. Mercedes-Benz's U.S. assembly work mentioned. Betsey Stevenson responds.
news.summary: Former President Donald Trump faced backlash for suggesting automotive assembly work is simple enough for a child to do, during an interview at the Economic Club of Chicago. Trump downplayed the complexity of U.S. auto manufacturing, particularly for foreign manufacturers like Mercedes-Benz, whom he described as essentially doing assembly work in the U.S. In response, former Obama administration economic adviser Betsey Stevenson challenged Trump to demonstrate car assembly at his next rally. Stevenson's challenge came after Trump's comments sparked criticism from labor advocates and Democratic officials.

news.headline: Quinbrook secures offtake agreements with Tesco and Shell for Cleve Hill Solar Park, covering 100% of solar power.
news.summary: In London, Quinbrook has finalized two extended offtake agreements with Tesco and Shell for the entire solar power production from its Cleve Hill Solar Park. The agreements encompass 100% of the generated solar power and guarantee a long-term commitment from both companies.

news.headline: HUTCHMED finds TAGRISSO® + ORPATHYS® effective in patients with high MET levels in SAVANNAH Phase II trial.
news.summary: Recent data has revealed promising results for an oral treatment combination in combating resistance driven by MET in EGFR-mutated lung cancer. The study showcased significant efficacy, with a notable decrease in tumor size observed in 80% of patients. Additionally, the combination therapy led to a 60% reduction in metastases spread, highlighting its potential in treating this particular form of lung cancer. These findings underscore the importance of exploring innovative treatment strategies to improve outcomes for patients with specific genetic mutations.

news.headline: Olivier Falut named CFO of EUROAPI, effective Oct 17, 2024. Evelyne Nguyen to assist in transition until end of Oct.
news.summary: In Paris on October 16, 2024, Olivier Falut has been named as the new Chief Financial Officer of EUROAPI, starting from October 17, 2024. Falut will also join the Executive Committee. He succeeds Evelyne Nguyen, who will continue to support the company until the end of the month to facilitate a seamless handover.

news.headline: Aprocitentan data to be shared at ASN Kidney Week 2024. Stay tuned for updates on latest findings.
Cognizant unveils multi-agent AI orchestration on Neuro® platform, aiding businesses in quick AI decisioning. Many already benefit.
news.summary: The updated platform now includes advanced multi-agent AI orchestration capabilities that can speed up enterprise AI productivity and growth. Numerous companies have utilized the platform to quickly create and test AI decision-making scenarios that provide tangible business benefits.

news.headline: Litecoin surges 7% after ETF application filing, trading volume up by 149%, highest value in 2.5 months.
news.summary: Litecoin (LTC) saw significant gains, with a 7% increase following the filing of an ETF tracking its price by Canary Capital. Created in 2011 from a Bitcoin (BTC) hard fork, it outpaced all other cryptocurrencies, including Bitcoin. The trading volume surged by 149% in the past day, driving LTC to its highest value in 2.5 months. Canary Capital's S-1 filing was the catalyst for this rally.

news.headline: Pluribus Technologies Corp. (TSXV: PLRB) amends Second Forbearance Agreement, dated August 14, 2024.
news.summary: Toronto-based Pluribus Technologies Corp. (TSXV: PLRB) has disclosed an update regarding the forbearance agreement. The amendment, known as the "Amendment," modifies the Second Forbearance Agreement initially established on August 14, 2024, between the Company and...

news.headline: UK failing to keep up with increasing floods, numbers show rising impact.
Alibaba's VP talks about AI translation tool on Bloomberg, uncovering key insights.
Alibaba's VP talks about AI translation on Bloomberg, tune in for insights. #Alibaba #AI #Translation #Bloomberg
Ark Invest sees Ethereum as transformative for finance industry, likening its attributes to US Treasury bills. ETH staking yield key in DeFi growth.
news.summary: Ark Invest, an asset management firm, has shown confidence in the Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH) network's transformative capabilities in the financial services sector. In a research paper shared by founder Cathie Wood on Tuesday, Ark Invest emphasized Ethereum's potential role in decentralized finance (DeFi) due to its position as an "institutional-grade asset" with yield-bearing potential. The paper compared ETH to U.S. Treasury bills, indicating its development in the digital asset space. Additionally, Ark Invest noted that ETH and its staking yield were becoming benchmarks within the digital asset industry for evaluating other Layer 1s, risk profiles, and returns. The full story is available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Global central banks diverging from Fed's policies, impacting markets heavily. Major shift in monetary alignment observed.

IBM study finds insurance leaders favor generative AI adoption for competition, but customers are hesitant. ARMONK, N.Y., Oct. 16, 2024 /PRNewswire - Executives see AI as risky yet promising. (Character count: 139)
news.summary: High-ranking executives acknowledge generative AI as a dual threat and advantage ARMONK, N.Y., October 16, 2024 -- Recently released findings from IBM's Institute for Business Value reveal a disparity in the perception of generative AI utilization between insurers and clients. The study, conducted by IBM (NYSE: IBM), highlights the conflicting viewpoints on the importance and potential risks associated with the technology.

news.headline: U.S. News announces 2025 Best Insurance Companies for Medicare Advantage, evaluating 30+ quality measures.
news.summary: In 2025, ratings will incorporate an improved methodology, analyzing over 30 quality indicators. On October 16, 2024, U.S. News & World Report, a renowned health care ranking and consumer advice organization, revealed the Best Insurance Companies for Medicare Advantage in 2025.

news.headline: ALDI offers Thanksgiving meal for 10 people under $47, lowest in 5 years, helping shoppers save more.
news.summary: A popular retailer known for offering affordable prices in America is assisting customers in saving money and enjoying larger feasts this holiday season by reintroducing pre-inflation pricing. Located in Batavia, Illinois, on October 16, 2024, ALDI announced that it is providing its most budget-friendly Thanksgiving basket in half a decade. The basket is designed to feed 10 individuals and includes a variety of meal items at a cost-effective rate.

news.headline: Global M&A market shows uneven recovery: Deal value up by 10% in 2024, North America and Europe rebounding while Asia-Pacific hits ten-year low. More than 40% of deals facing delays.
news.summary: According to BCG's 21st Annual M&A Report, deal value has seen a 10% increase in the first nine months of 2024. While North America and Europe are showing signs of recovery, Asia-Pacific has experienced a ten-year low with sluggish M&A activity in China. Over 40% of M&A deals have been delayed due to heightened uncertainties.

news.headline: ECW approves $1.5M for Lebanon, total funding hits $25.8M. 1.2M displaced, 20,330 children to benefit from education support.
news.summary: Amid escalating conflict, 1.2 million individuals have been displaced, with a particular concern for the safety of children. An influx of funding from the Expanded Education Cannot Wait (ECW) First Emergency Response initiative, facilitated by UNICEF, aims to provide comprehensive educational support in areas at high risk, benefiting a total of 20,330 children. This initiative comes as a response to urgent needs highlighted in war-torn regions. The announcement was made in New York on October 16, 2024.

news.headline: CADCA receives CDC funding through National Partners Cooperative Agreement, enabling 5-year public health infrastructure enhancement.
news.summary: In Alexandria, Virginia, on October 16th, 2024, CADCA revealed their receipt of funding from the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC) under the National Partners Cooperative Agreement. This substantial five-year grant will enable CADCA to strengthen public health initiatives and programs.

news.headline: Bridgepoint will reinvest in Kyriba alongside new minority investor General Atlantic in San Diego.
news.summary: San Diego-based company, Bridgepoint, has announced plans to reinvest in Kyriba, a move that will involve bringing on a new minority investor, General Atlantic. This strategic decision signals a significant financial commitment by Bridgepoint, demonstrating their continued confidence in Kyriba's growth potential. The injection of funds is expected to bolster Kyriba as they further expand their operations and enhance their market position. The partnership between Bridgepoint and General Atlantic underscores a strong belief in Kyriba's business model and future prospects.

news.headline: Israel Attacks Southern Suburb of Beirut: LBCI
EdgeNext partners with National Pulse at Gitex 2024 to drive innovation and market expansion in the Middle East.
news.summary: In Dubai, UAE, global cloud service provider EdgeNext has forged a key partnership with National Pulse during Gitex 2024. National Pulse, known for backing cutting-edge technologies, teams up with companies to aid digital transformation. The collaboration focuses on leveraging shared resources, technology, and knowledge to strengthen operations. It also seeks to delve into fresh market prospects in the Middle East and other regions. This move is expected to propel both entities forward in their growth trajectory.

news.headline: Woodside Energy Group releases Q3 2024 results. CEO acknowledges employee death at Clean Ammonia Project. Safety is top priority.
news.summary: In Perth, Australia, Woodside Energy Group CEO, Meg O'Neill, expressed condolences for the recent passing of a construction contractor employee at their Clean Ammonia Project in Beaumont, Texas in early October. Safety remains their utmost priority, and they are actively investigating the incident alongside local authorities, OCI, and the contractor company. Woodside Energy Group operates under ASX: WDS, NYSE: WDS, and LSE: WDS. The company is committed to ensuring a safe work environment for its employees.

news.headline: Korea Zinc defends control as MBK-Young Poong secures 5.34% stake, short of 7% target. #businessnews
news.summary: In Seoul, South Korea, Korea Zinc (KRX:010130), a prominent producer of non-ferrous metals in global supply chains, has responded to MBK-Young Poong's failed tender offer. Despite MBK-Young Poong securing a 5.34% stake in Korea Zinc, below their desired 7%, Korea Zinc has effectively retained control of Young Poong Precision Corporation. This development comes in light of Korea Zinc's position as a crucial player in critical supply chains.

news.headline: Fed's Bostic forecasts robust US economy ahead.
Synnefo partners with Aprecomm to offer tailored cloud and AI-powered customer experience management for mid-size broadband providers, enhancing subscriber management.
news.summary: A powerful partnership has been formed between Aprecomm and Synnefo, merging Aprecomm's suite of customer experience applications with Synnefo's OSS and BSS solutions. This collaboration will offer broadband service providers a comprehensive package to revamp subscriber management. The combined super-stack is a best-of-breed solution that can be implemented efficiently.

news.headline: Bloom Together LLC in San Leandro celebrates new chapter with ribbon cutting hosted by Chamber of Commerce on Nov. 14, 2024, 4-5:30 PM.
news.summary: Bloom Together LLC, a successful wellness center located in the heart of San Leandro, will be hosting a ribbon-cutting ceremony in collaboration with the San Leandro Chamber of Commerce. This event is scheduled for November 14, 2024, starting at 4:00 PM and concluding at 5:30 PM at Bloom Yoga.

news.headline: IDF requests evacuation of certain areas in southern suburb of Beirut
Token sale for Trump-backed platform flops at $10M, only 3.4% of the $300M target reached amidst site issues.
news.summary: The token sale for World Liberty Financial, supported by Donald Trump, has encountered challenges, achieving only 3.4% of its target to sell $300 million worth of tokens.

news.headline: Bitcoin rises to $67,341.02 (+2.22%), Ethereum falls to $2,617.63 (-0.30%), Dogecoin at $0.1166 (-1.31%). Market bullish, with Bitcoin's rally driven by $71K target. Fear & greed index up to 73.
news.summary: Bitcoin experienced a 2.22% increase, reaching a price of $67,341.02, while Ethereum saw a slight dip of 0.30% to $2,617.63, and Dogecoin decreased by 1.31% to $0.1166. Despite a sharp decline in stock prices, Bitcoin's rally continued to be sustained, hitting its highest value in July. The surge was attributed to election-driven factors, potentially due to Donald Trump's lead over Kamala Harris in prediction markets. Total liquidations in the cryptocurrency market surpassed $304 million in 24 hours, with $182 million in upward bets lost. Bitcoin's Open Interest rose to $38.10 billion indicating new money flowing into the market. The Cryptocurrency Fear & Greed index rose from 65 to 73, showing increasing optimism.
